text.title: QA Performance Run Verdict Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Is there a perf gate with declared SLOs blocking release promotion?

conclusion.verdict: rerun with more load or mark INCONCLUSIVE

text.example: RC1 perf run for v2.4. Baseline perf-2026-05-16-green. p95 on POST /orders jumped 145→690ms; SLO is p95<500ms → endpoint fails. samples=4200, env fingerprint c5.2xlarge|dataset-v3|shape-A. Verdict=FAIL; recommendation=hold. Report committed to release/v2.4/perf-verdict.json.
